title: Doff Complete Lawn Feed, Weed & Moss Killer – 1kg Triple-Action Lawn Feed Treatment for Gardens – Condition & Thicken Lawns, Control Weeds & Moss, Promotes Greener Grass Year-Round
features: SUPERIOR LAWN QUALITY – Achieve a lush green lawn with Doff Complete Lawn Feed, Weed & Moss Killer. This triple-action formula feeds and conditions lawns while killing moss and broad-leaved weeds. Ideal for established lawns, it ensures rapid lawn greening, durability, and vitality

FAST & RELIABLE GROWTH – Simplify lawn care with this direct-application granular formula, designed for quick improvement. Cultivate a healthy, uniform lawn with this easy-to-use mix by scattering granules evenly in spring or autumn and watering. Perfect for effortless lawn maintenance

NOURISH & PROTECT – Packed with nitrogen to boost lush, green growth, iron to blacken moss and deepen grass colour, and herbicides to tackle weeds. This simple all-in-one weed killer formula creates a healthy, vibrant lawn with ease, making gardening hassle-free and delivering reliable results

FRESH & VIBRANT – A complete lawn treatment to control weeds, manage moss and nourish existing lawns leaving it greener and healthier with minimal effort. A 1kg pack of complete lawn feed covers up to 30m², ensuring effective results. Available in 1kg, 1.6kg and 3.2kg packs

GROWING GREENER – With decades of expert experience, Doff lawn care products deliver lush and healthy grass. Our quality-crafted solutions are packed in the UK, ensuring reliable results and rapid year-round growth and greener lawns
